text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

I've fixed the reported problem in ncplist.1 along with some 
other problems in that file.  I'm waiting for bp to mail back 
approval 
for the patches I've sent him for ncplogin.1 and ncplogout.1, 
which address your issue raised with ncplogout.1.
